tests.name: pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goPackagePath prefers a direct package file when the import resolves to package.go
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goPackagePath falls back to the first non-test file in the package directory
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goPackagePath resolves the root package directory when the import path matches the module name
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goPackagePath returns null when the package directory is missing, not a directory, or only contains test files
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goPackagePath returns null when no go.mod can be found between the file and workspace root
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goPackagePath returns null when the package cannot be resolved inside the module
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goModule reads the Go module name from go.mod
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goModule trims module names and reuses the cached lookup for the same project root
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goModule returns the matching package directory for root and nested imports
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goModule returns null when go.mod is missing or does not declare a root-level module line
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goModule returns null for external imports even when the workspace has a valid module name
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/goImports resolves absolute and relative imports and stores bindings by alias or package name
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/goImports prefers an explicit alias name over the package basename
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/go routes import, callable, type, and call nodes to the matching handlers
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/go ignores unknown Go node types and normalizes the collected result
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/goHandlers creates function and method symbols only when declarations have a name
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/goHandlers classifies type specs from the type field, named-child fallback, and missing type nodes
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/analyze/goHandlers adds call relations for function-field identifiers, named-child selector fallbacks, and missing bindings
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goPackagePath behavior sorts filtered go source files and excludes test or non-go entries
pipeline/plugins/treesitter/runtime/projectRoots/goPackagePath behavior returns null immediately when the package directory cannot be resolved
